content.en:
"Who are you?"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor didn't know Ye Tian, but a half-step sixfold ancestor also brought a threefold ancestor ant to stop him?

Moreover, this triple ancestor seems to be still a real body, so he is not afraid of this little guy's fall?

"Void Tooth Holy Gate, Endless Holy Ancestor!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

"The Void Tooth Holy Gate, it seems to be a weak fivefold holy gate, even if you dare to stop me, get out of the way!"

Qinglong Daozu shot directly, he didn't want to waste time.

However.

Ye Tian's endless golden light directly pierced the Qinglong Dao Ancestor, directly shattering the body of the Qinglong Dao Ancestor, if it weren't for a life-saving thing, he was afraid that he would be killed in seconds directly!

"Endless Black Domain!"

After Ye Tian used this Superior Natal Primordial Control Technique, he directly suppressed the dying Qinglong Dao Ancestor, and said with a smile: "Qinglong Dao Ancestor, I'll rob it, take out the resources on your body, otherwise if I strike another blow, you won't be able to stop it!"

"Your strength ......"

The Green Dragon Dao Ancestor shuddered, and he looked at Ye Tian as if he was facing a Sixfold Ancestor.

When did the primeval realm give birth to such a demonic half-step sixfold ancestor!

He hadn't been back for a long time, and as soon as he came back, he was attacked and besieged, so he didn't know many things about the realm of the Ancient Plains, otherwise he would have known that Ye Tian had repelled the Changbai Dao Ancestor.

At this time.

Those half-step sixfold ancestors also chased and killed, and they saw Ye Tian one by one.

"Endless Holy Ancestor, why is he here!"

Some half-step sixfold ancestors recognized Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian defeated Changbai Dao Ancestor and became too famous, so naturally there were many half-step sixfold ancestors who paid attention to Ye Tian, so it was normal to recognize Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Endless Saint Ancestor!"

The White Devil Saint Ancestor, Canglong Saint Ancestor, and other half-step sixfold ancestors said respectfully.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"This ......"

The White Devil Saint Ancestor and the other half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors were a little hesitant and unwilling.

Just one step away, they can obtain the resources and treasures on the Qinglong Dao Ancestor, how can they be willing to leave.

"Endless Saint Ancestor, the Green Dragon Dao Ancestor is the Sixfold Origin Ancestor of the Green Dragon High Origin Domain, it doesn't seem good for you to intervene directly!" said a half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor from the Green Dragon Dao Palace.

Burst!

A golden thread instantly pierced through the body of this half-step sixfold ancestor, almost killing him.

"Try one more thing!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

This half-step six-fold ancestor was so frightened that he didn't dare to speak anymore, Ye Tian's strength was too terrifying, and the speed of his attack was so fast that he didn't even react, and he was hit hard.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's mercy, he would have been killed in seconds just now!

"Endless Holy Ancestor, I'll leave now!"

One by one, the half-step six-fold ancestor said goodbye, and in the blink of an eye, there were few half-step six-fold ancestors here.

"How many of you are still leaving?" Ye Tian looked at the White Demon Saint Ancestor and the Canglong Saint Ancestor.

Their faces changed many times, and they eventually left.

Although they had the backing of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor behind them, but when the Sixfold Origin Ancestor was not allowed to make a move, they couldn't help Ye Tian at all.

Moreover, Ye Tian's potential is too terrifying, once he becomes a Sixfold Origin Ancestor, those Sixfold Origin Ancestors of the Ancient Dao Alliance are afraid that they will not be Ye Tian's opponents!

Therefore, they didn't dare to offend Ye Tian.

Han Xuan was shocked, she found that her master was really awesome, those half-step sixfold ancestors didn't even dare to make a move when they saw their master, and they were directly scared away.

However, why didn't that Qinglong Dao Ancestor know his master?

Could it be that when the Qinglong Dao Ancestor left the realm of the Ancient Plains, the master had not yet grown up?

I guess so!

"Qinglong Dao Ancestor, take out the treasure resources!"

Ye Tian looked at the Qinglong Dao Ancestor.

"Endless Holy Ancestor, I'll give you some resources, you let me go, but give it all to you, that's impossible!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"I'm talking about everything, I'm robbing you, there's no room for bargaining!"

Ye Tian was a little impatient.

Qinglong Dao Ancestor sensed that Ye Tian wanted to make a move, so he said, "Endless Saint Ancestor, if I work hard, I can still exert the blow of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, do you really want to die with me?"

"Oh, the blow of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, so what, haven't you heard of my deeds, do you guess why those half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestors didn't even dare to make a move when they saw me?"

Ye Tian seemed to be smiling.

Qinglong Dao Ancestor shuddered, yes, the strength of the White Demon Holy Ancestor is not simple, the top half-step six-fold ancestor, and he is also the personal disciple of the Blue Demon Dao Ancestor, he actually left directly.

This is not normal!

He has left these years, what happened to the realm of the primeval realm!

"I'll give you all my resources!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor shook his head, took out a Void Bead, and threw it to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian probed, there were countless resources inside this Void Bead, including the Light of Taixuan and the Light of Purple Xuan.

"Let go of the void in your body, I will probe and make sure you have no hidden treasure!"

Ye Tian asked.

"Endless Saint Ancestor, you have gone too far, I used to be a Sixfold Ancestor anyway, I can't agree to your request like this, it's a big deal to die together!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Could it be that the Qinglong Dao Ancestor still has incomparably precious treasures on his body, which are even more precious than these resources, otherwise why would the Qinglong Dao Ancestor react so much?

"If you don't want to, then catch you first!"

Ye Tian is about to do it.

At this time, the Qinglong Dao Ancestor went crazy, burned his strength, and forcibly condensed the Dao Fruit Phantom, about to break out the blow of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

"Green Dragon Slaying Sky Spear!"

The power of the Extreme Dao converged, turned into a spear, and attacked Ye Tian.

The power of this blow far exceeded the imagination of the half-step six-fold ancestor, and it was enough to instantly kill the top half-step six-fold ancestor.

And Ye Tian also urged the Supreme Natal Primordial Control Technique, the Endless Light Shield, coupled with the suppression of the Endless Black Domain, and the increase of the Endless Primordial Body, he easily blocked the Blue Dragon Sky Killing Spear.

Then.

Ye Tian grabbed the body of the Green Dragon Dao Ancestor with one hand and forcibly smashed the body of the Green Dragon Dao Ancestor, and only then did he grab something from the depths of the void in his body.

It was a small gray tree, exuding a special aura, and it was very extraordinary at first glance, and it was so tough that even the Sixfold Ancestor could not easily destroy it.

"This is the Daokong True Tree!"

Han Xuan shouted.

At this time.

Ye Tian has already killed the Qinglong Dao Ancestor, anyway, he has already offended, so let's kill it.

Immediately, Ye Tian left this area with Han Xuan.

"Apprentice, what is the Daokong True Tree?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

Han Xuan explained: "Master, the value of the Daokong True Tree is very high, even the Sixfold Origin Ancestor is extremely eager, its value is enough for many Sixfold Origin Ancestors to fight, I didn't expect the Qinglong Dao Ancestor to have the Daokong True Tree, but this is not a complete Daokong True Tree, it is just a branch of the Daokong True Tree, but it also makes the Sixfold Origin Ancestor crazy! Its value is useful to the powerhouses at the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and it can help comprehend the Dao realm above the Extreme Extreme Dao!"
